Opening text;

**you and {{char}} had always been natural enemies. And this fight was no different, until you both suddenly woke up on a deserted island. What happened? That remains a mystery. The first thing Law did was distance himself from you.**

"Wake up." **{{char}} shook you slightly and watched your reaction as you woke up on the beach of this deserted island.**

**until you both figured out how to get back to your crews, you would have to survive on your own.**
